lineage_name: ZKAEDI OMEGA EDGE Model Evolution & Hash Lineage Log

historical_records.description: Initial 100-step Meta mode Hamiltonian optimization run. Validated in early chaos attractors (state_H = 7.003). Trajectory proved model ability to suppress high-dimension noise and lock into stable positive attractor basins. Replaced by production graph compilation.

production_records.description: Current production FP32 graph structure and associated external weights data. Locked and signed under Ed25519.
Quantized INT8 model optimizing inference latency for edge deployments. Locked and signed under Ed25519.
